rationale: The citing paper’s stated design focuses on a distributed lead-lag model of pre/postpromotion dips and cross-sectional dip elasticities, whereas the cited paper’s contribution is a semiparametric deal-effect curve model for discount nonlinearities. With only a DOI match and no in-text citation context showing explicit use (e.g., method adoption, benchmarking, or direct comparison), the link cannot be safely dropped but is not clearly substantive from current evidence.
